system.description: The Librarian summons a torrent of psychic fire to burn and char his foes. He may pick a point within range and engulf it in a cloud of flame with a radius of 2 metres x PR. All those within the area will suffer 1d10 Energy damage x PR. In addition, all those within the area of effect must make Challenging (+0) Agility Tests or be set on fire (see page 260).
